title: EIIS install.manifest v1
description: Written by install.sh into <target>/install.manifest.json after a successful install. Defined by EIIS §3. v1.3 adds optional fields spec_file and skills. v1.4 adds role values 'agent-profile' and 'ecl-version'; adds optional field canonical_inventory_strict.

version.description: SemVer of the Eidolon at install time. May be overridden post-write by a meta-installer (EIIS v1.0 §3.6).

installed_at.description: ISO 8601 / RFC 3339 UTC timestamp of this install. The only non-deterministic field (EIIS v1.0 §3.5).

target.description: Relative path to the install directory inside the consumer repo.

hosts_wired.description: Hosts for which dispatch files were created or updated. EIIS v1.1 §3.2.

path.description: Path of the written file, relative to consumer repo root.

sha256.description: SHA-256 hex digest of the file content after writing.

role.description: Semantic role of this file in the Eidolon install. v1.4 adds 'agent-profile' (agent.md always-loaded P0 profile) and 'ecl-version' (ECL_VERSION install-target copy).

files_written.description: Array of all files written. EIIS v1.0 §3.4 — MUST be populated when --manifest-only is false; warn-only enforcement until 2027-04-24, then MUST-fail.

handoffs_declared.description: Pipeline neighbours declared in the Eidolon's agent.md frontmatter.

token_budget.description: Token counts measured at install time.

working_set_target.description: Declared always-loaded budget target for this Eidolon.

security.description: Self-declared security posture of this Eidolon.

persists.description: Paths where the Eidolon may persist state (e.g. Memex root).

ecl_version_emitted.description: The ECL spec version this Eidolon targets when emitting inter-Eidolon artefacts. If present, MUST match the value in the repo-root ECL_VERSION file (EIIS v1.2 §4.6.4).

spec_file.description: Canonical full-spec path (v1.3+, EIIS §1.8). MUST point at the SPEC.md emitted by this install. Optional in the JSON Schema; conformance-required at EIIS_VERSION >= 1.3 via check.sh (two-tier validation, §2.5.1).

canonical_inventory_strict.description: v1.4+. When true, this install declares §1.9 strict-inventory conformance (EIIS v1.4 §3.7). Default behaviour at EIIS_VERSION >= 1.4 is true. Permits opt-out for v1.3-conformant Eidolons mid-migration (declared false). Schema-optional; conformance-required at EIIS_VERSION >= 1.4 unless explicitly false.

skills.description: Skills emitted by this install, with both source-of-truth and host-vendor paths (v1.3+, EIIS §3.8).

source_sha256.description: SHA-256 hex digest of the source-of-truth file.

vendor_path.description: Claude Code host vendor copy path. Present when claude-code is in hosts_wired (EIIS v1.3 §4.2.4.1).

vendor_sha256.description: SHA-256 of the vendor copy. MUST equal source_sha256 when present (EIIS v1.3 §4.2.4.2).
